What excites you most about the opportunity to work at ShipBob?
fields.value:
I'm excited about the opportunity to work at ShipBob, Inc. because I'm drawn to organizations that operate at scale, solve complex technical challenges, and prioritize innovation and long-term impact. Throughout my experience at Microsoft and Amazon Robotics, I've enjoyed working at the intersection of technology, operations, and strategy — leading cross-functional initiatives, building scalable systems, and driving measurable business outcomes.

What particularly interests me about ShipBob, Inc. is the opportunity to contribute to high-impact products and programs while collaborating with talented teams across engineering, product, and business functions. I'm especially motivated by environments where I can combine technical depth with program leadership to improve reliability, automation, and operational efficiency.

In my current role, I've led large-scale resilience and automation initiatives, developed AI-driven workflow solutions, and managed complex cross-organizational programs under executive visibility. I enjoy taking ambiguous problems, creating structure, and driving execution from concept through delivery. I'd be excited to bring that same mindset to ShipBob, Inc. while continuing to grow in a fast-paced and innovative environment.

Beyond the technical challenges, I'm also looking for a company whose culture emphasizes ownership, collaboration, and continuous improvement. From what I've seen, ShipBob, Inc. aligns strongly with those values, which makes the opportunity especially compelling to me.

Protecting your personal data is our priority. This privacy policy describes and applies to the processing of your personal data by ShipBob. This privacy policy explains your rights and our obligations concerning the processing of your personal data.

Every application is carefully reviewed by a member of our team to ensure a fair and thoughtful evaluation process. The quality of your responses plays a crucial role in helping us understand your motivations, alignment with ShipBob’s mission, and suitability for the role. We encourage you to provide thoughtful, detailed answers to give us the best insight into your background and interest in ShipBob.

fields.label: It is ShipBob’s policy to provide reasonable accommodations to people with disabilities. If you have a disability and wish to discuss a potential accommodation related to completing this application, interviewing, or participating in the employee selection process, please contact talent@shipbob.com.

If invited for an interview, does ShipBob have your consent to have an AI notetaker record and transcribe your interview? Video and audio will be recorded. This allows our interviewers to focus fully on engaging with you, rather than taking notes. The recordings and transcripts will be securely stored and retained for a limited period in accordance with our data retention policy. The AI notetaker does not make any decisions regarding your application. Participation is optional, and opting out has no bearing on your interview outcome. If you do not wish to participate, click the link below to opt out:
